Graal False Negative - test order dependency (OD flaky tests). In Apache Commons CLI, `OptionBuilder` is a static singleton-style builder: All of its configuration (like longOpt, argName, hasArg, etc.) is stored in static fields. Changes of configurations are global until a call to `create()` consumes those fields (to build an Option object) and resets the builder’s static fields back to their defaults. Therefore, tests can be order-dependent if a previous decomposed test changes configuration fields without calling `create()`.  Minimal reproducible command: `mvn clean test -Drat.skip -Dtest=OptionBuilderTest#testCompleteOption_test1_decomposed,OptionBuilderTest#testBaseOptionStringOpt_test4_decomposed`.
